measurement_note: Size is n, the sentence length. Every tier uses ten-letter words and requests all words, forcing the complete sentence to be processed. A single scan takes O(n) time. A correct alternative that restarts at the beginning to locate each successive word boundary repeatedly examines the same prefixes and takes O(n^2) time while completing every legal tier.
